Discover the Samsung Galaxy A35 (6+128GB) Light Violet Lilac, a perfect blend of style and performance. With its sleek design, powerful Exynos 1380 processor, and a stunning 6.6-inch Super AMOLED display, this smartphone offers an exceptional user experience. Capture every moment with the advanced 50MP triple camera system and enjoy seamless multitasking with 6GB of RAM. The Samsung Galaxy A35 (6+128GB) Light Violet Lilac is the ideal choice for tech enthusiasts seeking a reliable and stylish device. Specifications
    Display: 6.6 inches, 1080 x 2340 pixels, Super AMOLED, 120Hz, HDR10+ Processor: Exynos 1380 (5 nm) RAM: 6GB Storage: 128GB, expandable via microSDXC Main Camera: Triple 50 MP (wide) + 8 MP (ultrawide) + 5 MP (macro) Selfie Camera: 13 MP Battery: 5000mAh, 25W fast charging Operating System: Android 14, up to 4 major Android upgrades Dimensions: 161.7 x 78 x 8.2 mm Weight: 209 g SIM: Nano-SIM + eSIM (max 2 at a time) Connectivity: Wi-Fi 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/6, Bluetooth 5.3, GPS, GLONASS, GALILEO, BDS, USB Type-C 2.0 Other Features: IP67 dust and water resistance, Corning Gorilla Glass Victus+, Always-On display.
WHY SAMSUNG GALAXY A35 (6+128GB) LIGHT VIOLET ?
The Samsung Galaxy A35 (6+128GB) Light Violet Lilac stands out for its exceptional performance, thanks to the powerful Exynos 1380 processor and 6GB of RAM, ensuring smooth multitasking and efficient operation. Its 6.6-inch Super AMOLED display offers stunning visual clarity, making it perfect for media consumption and gaming. The advanced 50MP triple camera system allows you to capture high-quality photos and videos, while the 5000mAh battery with 25W fast charging ensures long-lasting battery life. Additionally, the sleek design, IP67 dust and water resistance, and the latest Android 14 make the Samsung Galaxy A35 (6+128GB) Light Violet Lilac a top choice for tech enthusiasts seeking a premium smartphone experience.

flashSales.name: WD Purple 1TB Hard Drive
flashSales.description: The WD Purple 1TB Hard Drive is engineered for high-definition security systems, supporting up to 64 cameras.
flashSales.fullDescription:
The WD Purple 1TB Hard Drive is engineered for high-definition security systems, supporting up to 64 cameras. It features AllFrame� technology, which reduces frame loss, improves video playback, and enhances overall recording performance. Built to withstand elevated heat and vibrations, it ensures durability and reliability in always-on environments. The WD Purple 1TB Hard Drive is compatible with up to 64 HD cameras, making it highly versatile for both small-scale and large-scale setups. Its efficient power consumption and robust build ensure long-term operation with minimal maintenance needs, while the SATA III 6 Gb/s interface delivers fast and reliable data transfer speeds. Perfect for continuous video monitoring and archival, the WD Purple 1TB Hard Drive is a trusted solution for safeguarding valuable surveillance data.
    Capacity: 1TB Interface: SATA III 6 Gb/s Form Factor: 3.5-inch Cache Size: 64MB Performance Class: 5400 RPM Sustained Data Transfer Rate: Up to 110 MB/s Workload Rating: Up to 180TB/year MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures): Up to 1 million hours Compatibility: Supports up to 64 HD cameras
